vehicle.model_designation_position: front left and right of the grille (viewer’s perspective: both sides of grille)

composition.truck_orientation: facing toward camera, slightly angled left
composition.important_crop_information: lower portion of wheels and small part of left cab mirror partially cut by crop; top roof margin and right lower fuel tank also cropped

company_identity.position: upper front sign board above windshield
company_identity.appearance: block letters, horizontal, gold on blue background

company_identity.position: front passenger side, below window, above wheel arch
company_identity.appearance: block letters, blue on light blue background, vertical stack

roof_lights.arrangement: horizontal row; 4 orange dome lights centrally, 2 blue lights at outer ends between conical white horns
roof_lights.outer_shape: circular/rectangular for dome, square for blue, conical for horns

grille_lights.position: upper grille, just above main grille slats

bumper_lights.arrangement: horizontal row, entire width of bumper

main_headlights.position: main vertical headlight clusters at far left and right edges of the front

front_geometry.grille_description: Horizontal bars in three main sections; top (fine slats), middle (larger), lower (broad)
front_geometry.headlight_description: Vertical, complex, with integrated LED-style running lights and main beams
front_geometry.bumper_description: Painted with integrated 5 rectangular lights, chrome-look lower edge
